'''tasada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumocentesis|pneumocentesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumocentesis|pneumocentesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tasada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsædæth|tæsædæth]] || [[word:tæsædæj|tæsædæj]] || [[word:tæsædæsh|tæsædæsh]] || [[word:tæsædæ|tæsædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasasadath|tasasadath]] || [[word:tasasadaj|tasasadaj]] || [[word:tasasadash|tasasadash]] || [[word:tasasada|tasasada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasadath|tasadath]] || [[word:tasadaj|tasadaj]] || [[word:tasadash|tasadash]] || [[word:tasada|tasada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasafdath|tasafdath]] || [[word:tasafdaj|tasafdaj]] || [[word:tasafdash|tasafdash]] || [[word:tasafdaf|tasafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasadatha|tasadatha]] || [[word:tasadaja|tasadaja]] || [[word:tasadasha|tasadasha]] || [[word:tasadaka|tasadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasadath|tasadath]] || [[word:tasadaj|tasadaj]] || [[word:tasadash|tasadash]] || [[word:tasada|tasada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasadathal|tasadathal]] || [[word:tasadajal|tasadajal]] || [[word:tasadashal|tasadashal]] || [[word:tasadakal|tasadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasadathatha|tasadathatha]] || [[word:tasadajaja|tasadajaja]] || [[word:tasadashasha|tasadashasha]] || [[word:tasadaka|tasadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasadathan|tasadathan]] || [[word:tasadajan|tasadajan]] || [[word:tasadashan|tasadashan]] || [[word:tasadakan|tasadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasadathaoro|tasadathaoro]] || [[word:tasadajaoro|tasadajaoro]] || [[word:tasadashaoro|tasadashaoro]] || [[word:tasadakaoro|tasadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
